commit.subject: LU-6142 lctl: Move hard-coded err msg to CMD_HELP
commit.message:
LU-6142 lctl: Move hard-coded err msg to CMD_HELP

This patch:
- Removes hard-coded err message under "lctl" to
return CMD_HELP message which is already defined
- capitalize first letter of running description
- corrects missing "usage", whenever required

Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I5828f61470f256a1e7e53331f649c4ba8134361f
